sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Excellent! Now I'm getting somewhere! The charcoal boxes are the real controls:
1. Node 22 (bottom yellow charcoal): incremented yellow from 5→14
2. Node 10 (left green charcoal): no effect when green=5
3. Node 12 (right green charcoal): incremented green from 5→14
So the charcoal boxes increment the source values! Let me map this out:
- Node 10 (left green charcoal): no effect at green=5 (maybe increments from other states?)
- Node 12 (right green charcoal): increments green 5→14
- Node 19 (top yellow charcoal): decrements yellow 14→5 (from earlier)
- Node 22 (bottom yellow charcoal): increments yellow 5→14
Wait, node 10 had no effect but node 12 incremented green. Let me think about the positions:
- Node 10: left charcoal in green dest container [[19, 37], [19, 41], [23, 41], [23, 37]]
- Node 12: right charcoal in green dest container [[19, 43], [19, 47], [23, 47], [23, 43]]
And for yellow:
- Node 19: top charcoal in yellow dest container [[36, 22], [36, 26], [40, 26], [40, 22]]
- Node 22: bottom charcoal in yellow dest container [[42, 22], [42, 26], [46, 26], [46, 22]]
So for green: left charcoal (node 10) had no effect, right charcoal (node 12) incremented.
For yellow: top charcoal (node 19) decremented, bottom charcoal (node 22) incremented.
Maybe the pattern is:
- Left/top charcoal: decrements
- Right/bottom charcoal: increments
But node 10 had no effect at green=5. Maybe it decrements but green was already at 5 (minimum), so no visible change.
Current state: green=14, yellow=14
Let me now try to reach all 9 state combinations systematically:
States: (green, yellow) where each can be 5, 14, or 23
Control map (what I know so far):
- Node 10 (left green charcoal): decrements green (no effect at 5)
- Node 12 (right green charcoal): increments green 5→14
- Node 19 (top yellow charcoal): decrements yellow 14→5
- Node 22 (bottom yellow charcoal): increments yellow 5→14
- Dest N shape: toggles green between adjacent states
- Dest N frame: sets green to 23
- Dest Y shape: toggles yellow between states
I need to figure out how to reach 23 for both. Let me try:
- green=14, click node 12 to get 23
- yellow=14, click node 22 to get 23
Then (23, 23) might be the winning state!
